entity.label: Shua
entity.subtitle: Female
entity.description: A daughter of Heber the Asherite (1 Chr. 7:32).

nodes.label: Shua
nodes.description: A daughter of Heber the Asherite (1 Chr. 7:32).

nodes.label: Heber
nodes.description: passing over. Son of Beriah and grandson of Asher ( Genesis 46:17 ; 1 Chronicles 7:31 1 Chronicles 7:32 ).

nodes.label: Hotham
nodes.description: A stroke, great-grandson of Asher (1 Chr. 7:35).

nodes.label: Shamer
nodes.description: A man of Asher (1 Chr. 7:32); called also Shamer (34).

verses.text: And Heber begat Japhlet, and Shomer, and Hotham, and Shua their sister.
